html:
2026-0567
2026-06-11PSCorrections and Conditional Release ActAppointment of the Correctional Investigator of Canada, on an interim basisAppointment of Valerie Phillips of Ottawa, Ontario, to be the Correctional Investigator of Canada, on an interim basis, to hold office during pleasure for a term of one year or until such time as a new Correctional Investigator of Canada is appointed, whichever occurs first, effective June 18, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of the Correctional Investigator of Canada, on an interim basis
precis: Appointment of Valerie Phillips of Ottawa, Ontario, to be the Correctional Investigator of Canada, on an interim basis, to hold office during pleasure for a term of one year or until such time as a new Correctional Investigator of Canada is appointed, whichever occurs first, effective June 18, 2026.
